description: 🛣️ Navigate through an endless road-crossing challenge in this engaging Crossy Road-style game designed for fun and skill development.
🌟 Play a classic Minesweeper game built in Java, designed for fun and skill development in problem-solving and strategy.
Automate Farming Simulator 25 mod development using a Claude skill trained on game APIs and common coding patterns.
Review, score, and improve game design and code with 28 Claude Code skills for the full game development workflow
This project combines practical game development skills with theoretical computer science concepts from Automata Theory.
Provide AI agent configurations and skills to enhance game development workflows with the Defold engine through easy integration and dependency access.

A modern React application for discovering video games, built as part of a course by Mosh Hamedani. This project demonstrates practical front-end development skills including API integration, responsive design, and reusable component architecture.

A modern and responsive personal portfolio website to showcase my skills in graphic design and web development. Includes projects, about section, and contact features. Built with HTML, CSS, Tailwind, and Django.
🏓 Create your own Breakout game with advanced ball physics and level design for a fun coding experience and game development skills enhancement.

Fun Bros is a 2D platformer game built using the Godot engine, featuring smooth player movement, collision detection, basic enemy interactions, and level design to demonstrate core game development and logic skills.
Agent skills extracted from game-development work and related agentic-workflow research

The practical capstone version of GAME491 gives senior-level GAME students the opportunity to apply their learned skills in programming, art, game design, and other disciplines to a long-term, team based game development project that aims to emulate real world game development practices in a classroom setting.
Skill library for Space Engineers plugin, mod and in-game script development. Usable with any "skills" compatible agentic coding harness.
A collection of my game development projects, skills, and experience, focused on Roblox development.

A dynamic frontend for a real-time multiplayer “Stop” game, featuring an animated neobrutalist design. Enables live gameplay through WebSocket integration, user authentication, and interactive UI elements, showcasing strong skills in responsive design, real-time interaction, and modern frontend development.
Claude Code skills for Android app and game development. Plugin marketplace covering Play Store launch checklists, plan validation, and more.
Agent Skills for AI-driven LÖVE / Love2D game development
My personal agent skill repository, primarily focused on game development.
Claude Code skills and task templates for design, documents, AI workflows, and game development
GDLC — Game Development Life Cycle. Playbook + skill for persona-driven playtest cycles, triangulated findings, and ratchet-only-tightens. Sibling to SDLC-wizard and PDLC under XDLC.

A collection of Python-based software development projects built during my internship at SkillCraft Technology. The projects focus on core programming concepts, problem-solving, and application development, including a temperature converter, number guessing game, Sudoku solver, and a web scraping tool.

# Unity Practice  This repository contains my Unity and C# practice scripts and small experiments.  ## Purpose To improve my game development skills by building and testing core gameplay mechanics in Unity.
Osama Khalil's skill collection for Claude Code and Codex. Three.js game development, pixel-perfect website cloning, and Tony Fadell-style spec review.

This repository contains my personal web development portfolio built with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript, showcasing my projects and skills as a Web Design and Web Programming student at Saint Paul College. A modern and responsive developer portfolio built with React and Vite, featuring a futuristic glassmorphism UI, animated sections, dynamic typewriter effects, and smooth navigation. Showcases my skills, projects, game development interests, and software engineering journey.

Repository of the book examples and exercises. A project-based guide to 3D and immersive game development with Godot 4, designed for programmers with basic skills who want to create engaging games (including VR) while learning both technical proficiency and player-focused design.
The aim of this project is to create a fun rock paper scissors mobile game in react native as a portfolio project to build and showcase skills in mobile app development.
